title: wiki-forge configuration
description: Configuration for the wiki-forge CLI. Applied as: project file (<repo>/wiki.config.jsonc) overrides system file (~/.config/wiki-forge/config.jsonc) overrides built-in defaults.

ignore.description: Extra glob patterns to exclude from repo scans (markdown doc discovery and source-file discovery). Appended to built-in exclusions; cannot un-ignore them.

workflow.description: Workflow-layer knobs for forge steering and skill routing.

phaseSkills.description: Skill aliases to surface for each forge phase. These values steer agents and prompts; they do not execute commands automatically.

research.description: Skill alias to recommend when the research phase is next.

domainModel.description: Skill alias to recommend when the domain-model phase is next.

prd.description: Skill alias to recommend when the PRD phase is next.

slices.description: Skill alias to recommend when slice decomposition is next.

tdd.description: Skill alias to recommend when implementation/TDD is next.

verify.description: Skill alias to recommend when verification/quality review is next.
